title: derris reticulata
intro: Derris reticulata, also known as the Kanjikil or Indian derris, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia, particularly in India, Sri Lanka, and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a natural insecticide. Derris reticulata is often prepared as a herbal decoction or tincture, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
